name: s-kit
description: Agent workflow kit for brainstorming, domain-doc grilling, dated specs, implementation waves, TDD, debugging, review, and delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Brainstorming, domain docs, dated specs, implementation waves, and review workflows
interface.longDescription: Use s-kit to guide agent work through brainstorming, domain language and ADR stress-testing, dated feature specs, wave-based implementation, test-driven development, systematic debugging, verification, code review, and branch finishing workflows.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for something I'd like to build.
Let's add a feature to this project.
